task: Ralph (2026-05-16): Prove Docker-on-Hetzner repeat-install recipe + zap every fresh-install bug. Server #2987905. Pre-seed MiniMax M2.7. Keep wizard at 4 steps (no 'create first app' gate). Run smoke harness; fix any failures at root cause until 0 fail.

stories.title: Robot API discover works with corrected #ws+ credentials
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/hetzner-provision.ps1 -Action discover -ServerNumber 2987905 returned HTTP 200, ServerIp=95.216.8.180, Dc=HEL1-DC2, Status=ready
Discovered IP held only in session vars; never written to disk

stories.title: SSH keypair on Robot account + working SSH into rescue
acceptanceCriteria: itdept.pub (RSA, fp a8:f0:c6:55:41:af:42:57:71:7e:e9:48:f9:d7:c7:9e) confirmed in Robot keys as `rsa-key-20190626`
doable-hetzner-test (ED25519, fp 68:6f:c9:85:cb:56:1e:0f:4c:90:1d:01:58:35:75:4f) also present in Robot keys
Rescue arming POST /boot/2987905/rescue accepted the ED25519 fingerprint and the itdept key both unlocked the rescue session

stories.title: Full rescue → installimage → reboot cycle completes on #2987905
acceptanceCriteria: POST /reset/2987905 type=hw returned 200 and box came back on port 22 within 3 minutes in rescue mode (Debian 12 bookworm, kernel 6.12.67)
/root/.oldroot/nfs/install/installimage -a -c /autosetup completed with exit 0 (Ubuntu 24.04.3 LTS via /root/images/Ubuntu-2404-noble-amd64-base.tar.gz)
Post-install reboot brought up Ubuntu 24.04.3 LTS, kernel 6.8.0-100-generic, 2x NVMe RAID1 (md0=/boot, md1=vg0 with root/swap/data LVs)

stories.title: Doable deploys via docker/setup.sh on the freshly-installed server
acceptanceCriteria: git archive HEAD | tar shipped 3112 files into /root/doable on the box
docker/setup.sh in HOST mode generated docker/.env (with DOABLE_KEK, JWT, ENCRYPTION_KEY, INTERNAL_SECRET, INSTALL_BOOTSTRAP_TOKEN), installed nginx + self-signed cert, ufw-allowed 22/80/443
docker compose up -d brought postgres + migrate + api + ws + web; migrate applied 116 migrations; all containers reached healthy/running
curl https://95.216.8.180/api/health returns 200 {"status":"healthy",...}
curl https://95.216.8.180/ returns 200 HTML (Next.js)

stories.title: Root-cause + fix every blocker found during the live install
acceptanceCriteria: BUG-DOCKER-KEK-001: docker/setup.sh now generates DOABLE_KEK + back-fills it on re-runs of pre-existing .env
BUG-DOCKER-MINIMAX-PASSTHROUGH-001: docker/docker-compose.yml api block now passes MINIMAX_API_KEY through (verified: env in container has the key)
BUG-DOCKER-AIKEYS-ENV-001: docker/setup.sh .env block now honors pre-exported ANTHROPIC/OPENAI/MINIMAX_API_KEY (was clobbering them with empty values)
BUG-DOCKER-ENVPERMS-001: docker/setup.sh chmods .env to 600 immediately on creation

BUG-DOCKER-WORKSPACE-MISSING-001: docker/Dockerfile deps stage now copies all 13 workspace package.json files (was missing 6 — caused api to crash with `Cannot find package 'zod' imported from packages/marketplace-bundle/src/manifest.ts`)
BUG-DOCKER-TMUX-BLINDSPOT-001: docker/tmux-entrypoint.sh now forwards tmux pane output to container stderr via `tmux pipe-pane`
BUG-DOCKER-NODE-ENV-HARDCODED-001: docker/docker-compose.yml NODE_ENV now interpolable via .env so QA can set NODE_ENV=development to satisfy the rate-limit fail-closed gate
BUG-DOCKER-RATE-LIMIT-PASSTHROUGH-001: docker/docker-compose.yml api block now passes RATE_LIMIT_DISABLED through for QA campaigns

BUG-INFRA-DISK-LAYOUT-001: autosetup updated to mount `data` LV at /var (not /var/lib/docker) — containerd snapshots also live on the data LV; recipe documents the bind-mount recovery for boxes already on the old layout

stories.title: Full smoke harness passes against the deployed instance
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/smoke-tests-docker.sh: 21/21 PASS, 0 FAIL on the live box
TC-SETUP-001 PASS — first registered user IS isPlatformAdmin:true
TC-SETUP-AI-001 PASS — fields_configured.ai_provider:true, ai_provider_key:true, ai_provider=custom, ai_provider_base_url set (proves MiniMax M2.7 pre-seed)
TC-AUTH-LOGIN-FIRST-001 PASS — smoke is idempotent: subsequent runs login as the persisted first admin instead of registering a non-admin second user
TC-ADMIN-FRAMEWORKS/FEATURES/USERS-001 PASS — admin endpoints reachable with the admin JWT
TC-AUTH-401-001..003 PASS — unauthenticated 401 wall confirmed

stories.title: Setup wizard is admin-friendly (no 'create first app' gate)
acceptanceCriteria: apps/web/src/app/setup/WizardShell.tsx is a 4-step flow (Welcome → AI Provider → Sign-in → Plans & Billing) — no 'create first app' step
apps/web/src/app/setup/steps/Step1Welcome.tsx copy explicitly says 'so your team can sign up and start building'
Banner from docker/setup.sh in the live run confirms the 4-step wizard

stories.title: Recipe markdown captures every gotcha from the live run
acceptanceCriteria: C:/Users/gj/Documents/doable-hetzner-recipe.md updated with: rescue arm/reset re-try pattern; itdept-key recommendation over stale ed25519; installimage path nuances; /root/images vs /root/.oldroot path equivalence; PaidUntil-past-date OK if status=ready; private github.com/doable-me/doable 404 — use git-archive ship; setup.sh non-interactive only when HOST or DOMAIN set; data LV at /var (not /var/lib/docker) + bind-mount recovery for existing boxes
No real credentials embedded — placeholders only
Top-of-file rotation warning still present

stories.title: Cycle is provably repeatable: second teardown + reinstall starts cleanly
acceptanceCriteria: After US-SMOKE-01 green, run a second rescue+reset and confirm SSH-into-rescue still works (proves the admin can restart the cycle ad infinitum)
Recipe step 10 (tear-down) verified by execution
